design_philosophy: A hand-forged, visceral digital experience. Avoid SaaS sterility. We use deep textural elements (leather, wood, parchment) combined with modern PWA usability. The calendar should feel like a hand-carved almanac. High contrast between the dark environment and 'ember' glowing interactive elements.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing, Asymmetrical Grids, Optical Alignment
spacing_and_layout.marketing_grid: Bento 'Tetris' Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8. Hero items span 8 cols, supplementary span 4 cols.
spacing_and_layout.dashboard_grid: Control Room Grid: dense, grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-6.
spacing_and_layout.containers: Use generous padding: p-8 to p-12 for distinct sections to let textures breathe.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-sm (We avoid pill-shapes or heavy rounding. Edges should feel sharp and hand-cut, max 4px radius).

ui_components_and_surfaces.cards: Flat background (surface color) with 1px border. NO soft modern shadows. Use subtle inset drop shadows or harsh offset shadows to simulate wood/leather carving.
ui_components_and_surfaces.buttons: Primary buttons: Ember red background, bone white text, sharp corners, ember glow on hover (shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(138,37,29,0.5)]). Secondary buttons: Transparent with border and accent text.
ui_components_and_surfaces.calendar: Hand-carved almanac feel. Grid cells with border-[#352A23]. Today's date highlighted with a subtle #8A251D border and text. Event markers use #1A2F24 or #8A251D dots/accents. Must include both month view and list view.
ui_components_and_surfaces.navigation: Glassmorphism header: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#110E0C]/80. Bottom border 1px #352A23. Desktop navigation visible.
ui_components_and_surfaces.inputs_and_forms: Shadcn components heavily customized: square borders, surface color backgrounds, text_primary for input, border color for outline. Focus ring uses #8A251D.

animations_and_motion.hover_states: Crisp and visceral. Opacity shifts and subtle glows. Avoid bouncy spring animations.
animations_and_motion.page_transitions: Fade and slight blur, resembling smoke or fog clearing.
animations_and_motion.scroll: Use smooth scrolling. Parallax on hero images to give depth to forests/markets.

image_urls.description: Cinematic wide photograph of a misty early medieval viking market in a dark nordic forest.
Cinematic photograph of a viking battle reenactment, warriors with round wooden shields.
High quality dark aged leather texture with subtle parchment edges.
Close up of rough hand-forged dark iron metal texture.
Ancient runestone standing tall in a verdant Swedish landscape.
The blacksmith is working with fire and metal.

accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements, forms, and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure Bone/Parchment text meets APCA/WCAG standards against Dark Charred Wood background.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup Tailwind config with colors, fonts (Cormorant Garamond, Cinzel, Outfit).
3. Build event calendar UI (month + list views) with hand-carved almanac aesthetics using pure HTML/Tailwind grid.
4. Implement public event submission form with customized Shadcn Form.
5. Setup Admin Dashboard using JWT authentication to approve/reject events.
6. Build site pages: About, Courses, Guilds/Associations, Shops/Merchants.
7. Implement PWA (manifest, service worker) for mobile installability.
8. Use the provided textures and background images to give depth to hero sections and cards.
9. Use `data-testid` on all buttons, forms, and interactive items.
